mainEntity.name: How much does monthly GST filing cost in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly packages start from Rs 1,500 for small businesses. Pricing varies based on invoice volume, number of GST registrations, and complexity (exports, RCM, etc.). Call +91-95139 39333 for a fixed-fee quote.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle LUT filing for export of services from Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Many Bangalore IT/ITeS companies export services. We handle Letter of Undertaking (LUT) filing under Section 16(3)(a), zero-rated supply compliance, and refund applications for accumulated ITC on exports.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle GST for my Bangalore startup from day one?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We provide end-to-end GST compliance from registration through ongoing return filing. For startups, we also advise on optimal registration timing, ITC planning, and compliance calendar setup.
